=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (7:48-7:67) TS377065: This Effect code uses `console.log`, logging in Effect code is represented through `Effect.log or Logger`. effect(globalConsoleInEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalConsoleInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalConsoleInEffect for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable globalConsoleInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalConsoleInEffect for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable globalConsoleInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalConsoleInEffect for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable globalConsoleInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalConsoleInEffect for entire file"
